goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'holy trinity church'.
Make sure you get 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 15:30' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called holy trinity church
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from stevenage and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 15:30 and should leave on sunday
